name: Context Assembly
description: Build, run, troubleshoot, or refine Context Assembly, especially the bundled apps/clipboard-studio macOS menu bar app. Use when Codex needs to work on clipboard-heavy context assembly, keep the panel compact, wire pasteboard or app-state capture, or validate the local Xcode workspace and tests without leaking sensitive data.
short_description: Build and validate the Context Assembly menu bar app for capture, export, and fast cross-app handoff.
audience: Mac users assembling context across apps
Builders moving clipboard snippets into prompts, notes, and markdown
Teams that need explicit local-first clipboard handling
detail_lines: Turns scattered clipboard snippets into one structured prompt, note, or markdown export.
Keeps capture, preview, send, and export actions compact enough for a menu-bar workflow.
Treats clipboard contents as sensitive by default and avoids hidden sync or broad persistence.
